settings.testimonial: I was unsure about spending nearly €120 on a pair of sandals and a summer dress from a brand I hadn’t ordered from before, but I’m genuinely delighted I gave it a chance. The quality was far better than I expected and everything arrived beautifully wrapped as well. The sandals are wonderfully comfortable and the dress fits perfectly for the warmer weather. I’ve since placed another order and I’m just as pleased.
settings.author: Bríd C.

settings.testimonial: The parcel arrived much quicker than I expected, only a few days to Waterford, and everything was packed with great care. The cardigan feels wonderfully made and like it will last for years.
settings.author: Siobhán K.

settings.testimonial: I had to contact customer support regarding sizing before ordering and they were incredibly helpful and patient. The blouse fits beautifully and is very comfortable to wear.
settings.author: Deirdre P.

settings.testimonial: After wearing the trousers regularly for several months now, I can honestly say they’ve held up beautifully. The stitching is still perfect, the fabric hasn’t lost its shape at all, and they remain as comfortable as the day they arrived. Proper long-lasting clothing is difficult to come by nowadays.
settings.author: Gráinne W.

settings.testimonial: What struck me first was how lovely the presentation was when the package arrived. Everything was folded neatly and the material felt substantial straight away. The dress itself is elegant without being fussy and you can tell real care has gone into making it. I’ve already had compliments the few times I’ve worn it.
settings.author: Aoife T.

custom_css: /* Review tekst aanpassen */.testimonials-slider__text .rte-setting p {font-size: 15px; /* pas aan indien je het kleiner/groter wilt */ line-height: 1.6;}
testimonials.name: t:sections.testimonials.presets.testimonials.name

settings.title: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.text: Yes, we are pleased to offer complimentary tracked shipping on all orders across the UK. Orders are delivered with trusted US carriers, including UPS, so you can follow your parcel with clear tracking updates from dispatch to delivery.

settings.title: Can I return an item if it does not fit or if I am not satisfied?
settings.text:
Of course. You may return your order within 30 days of receiving it. Items must be unworn, undamaged, and returned in their original condition.

To begin your return, simply contact us through our Contact Page or email us directly at support@parkerandlane-newyork.com. Our team will be happy to guide you through the return process.

settings.title: How can I track my order?
settings.text:
Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a confirmation email containing your personal tracking number.

You can follow your parcel at any time through our Order Tracking Page. Simply enter your tracking details to view the latest delivery updates.

settings.title: How do I choose the right size?
settings.text:
Each product includes a detailed size guide to help you choose the most suitable fit.

If you are between sizes, we recommend selecting the larger size for a little extra comfort. If you need further guidance, our customer care team will be happy to assist.

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.text:
You can complete your purchase securely using the following payment methods:

• Visa
• Mastercard
• American Express
• Apple Pay
• Google Pay
• Shop Pay

All payments are processed securely through trusted payment providers.

settings.title: Is my payment secure?
settings.text: Yes, your payment details are fully protected. We use industry standard SSL encryption to ensure your information remains safe and secure throughout the checkout process.

settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.text:
Orders are processed and dispatched within 24 hours on business days.

Delivery times may vary depending on your location, but we always strive to get your order to you as quickly as possible.

Once your order is on its way, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking details so you can follow your parcel at any time.

settings.title: How can I contact you if I have questions?
settings.text:
Our customer care team will be happy to assist you. You can reach us through our Contact Page or email us directly at support@parkerandlane-newyork.com.

We aim to respond to all enquiries within 24 hours.
